item.title: The Dow is just below 50,000. How to trade a move above the key level using options
This industrial giant is off to the races in 2026 after a strong 2025. Why there's more upside ahead
item.description: Caterpillar's has surged 117% over the past 12 months and is up 34% this year alone.

item.title: Morgan Stanley is bullish on this aerospace stock, says market underestimates growth drivers
item.description: The bank launched coverage of the aerospace and defense stock with an overweight rating.

item.title: Buy this best-in-class GLP-1 leader as competition heats up, says Barclays
item.description: Barclays' $1,350 price target implies upside of 32%.

item.title: HSBC downgrades this retail giant after earnings, flags weaker outlook
item.description: HSBC's new price forecast implies a 5% upside for shares of Walmart.
